title: Sysmon Cobalt Strike Named Pipe
description: Detects named pipe creation matching known Cobalt Strike default patterns. Cobalt Strike uses named pipes for inter-process communication and lateral movement via SMB beacon.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Pipe Name' like '\MSSE-*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\postex_*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\postex_ssh_*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\status_*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\msagent_*')) or (('Pipe Name' = '\interprocess_' or 'Pipe Name' = '\mojo.' or 'Pipe Name' = '\chrome.' or 'Pipe Name' = '\DserNamePipe' or 'Pipe Name' = '\winsock' or 'Pipe Name' = '\UIA_PIPE')))
falsepositives: Some legitimate software may use similar pipe naming patterns
